'''Grung squad''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] unit of [[wetland assault stormtrooper]]s serving on the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']]. Composed of eleven veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] armed with [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], one of whom was a [[Specialist/Legends|specialist]] wielding a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]], they participated in the [[Battle of Taul]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Uninvited Guests}}
